generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical steering servo component that adjusts ego vehicle steering angle based on ISO 15622 ACC logic"
]

instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for ACC implementation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance AccControllingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Implements ISO 15622 performance-class I adaptive cruise control logic computing desired speed based on lead vehicle distance"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
    DTDFVocab:enables AccControlLogicModel
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance EgoVehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Onboard sensor collecting real-time ego vehicle speed data from vehicle's chassis system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoVehicleSpeedDataStream
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo providing real-time steering angle measurements for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataStream
]

instance LiDARDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera providing 3D perception data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTrackDataStream
]

instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing point cloud data for object detection and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ObjectTrackDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction data streams
instance EgoVehicleSpeedDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoVehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR, LiDARDepthCamera
]

instance SensorFusionResults : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor fusion results combining ego state and object tracks for control decisions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleSpeedDataStream, SteeringAngleDataStream, ObjectTrackDataStream
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance Vehicle3DCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD-based visualization of the autonomous vehicle and surrounding environment rendered via ROS2-based 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2VisualizationEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering algorithm for object detection implemented in ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringFE
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for object tracking in LiDAR data processing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackingFE
]

instance AccControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 performance-class I adaptive cruise control logic implemented in Controlling FE"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccControllingFE
]

instance RealTimeEgoStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle state data (speed, steering angle) stored for reporting and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleSpeedDataStream, SteeringAngleDataStream
]

instance ObjectTrackDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks stored from LiDAR depth camera processing for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackDataStream
]

instance SensorFusionResultsDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Sensor fusion results combining ego state and object tracks for control decisions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorFusionResults
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware facilitating real-time data exchange between components via topics/topics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE, PointCloudClusteringFE, KalmanFilterTrackingFE, SensorFusionFE, AccControllingFE
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation Feature Engine serializing ROS2 message types for Wi-Fi transmission with 100ms latency"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
    DTDFVocab:enables EgoVehicleSpeedDataStream, SteeringAngleDataStream, ObjectTrackDataStream
]

instance PointCloudClusteringFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine implementing DBSCAN-based point cloud clustering for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
    DTDFVocab:enables LiDARPointCloudClusteringModel
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine implementing Kalman filter tracking for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
    DTDFVocab:enables KalmanFilterTrackingModel
]

instance SensorFusionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine combining ego state and object tracks for control decisions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
    DTDFVocab:enables SensorFusionResults
]

instance ControllingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine implementing ISO 15622 ACC logic for performance-class I adaptive cruise control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano
    DTDFVocab:enables AccControlLogicModel
]

instance ROS2VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based 3D visualization system for real-time rendering of vehicle and environment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Vehicle3DCADModel
]

instance SQLDatabaseEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database system for storing real-time ego state and object track data for reporting and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeEgoStateData, ObjectTrackDatabase, SensorFusionResultsDatabase
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer platform for real-time processing of ACC control logic"
]

instance ROS2PackageDevelopment : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package development framework for implementing feature engines in C++"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE, PointCloudClusteringFE, KalmanFilterTrackingFE, SensorFusionFE
]

instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for complex system modeling and testing"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LiDARPointCloudClusteringModel, KalmanFilterTrackingModel, AccControlLogicModel
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed, steering angle, object tracks, and projected driving path with report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides EgoStateVisualizationInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight, HistoricalReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from vehicle ECU to cloud/DT Entity using NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano for real-time processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlLogicExecutionAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and trigger emergency braking via web interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction, SpeedAdjustmentAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EgoStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle speed and steering angle in 3D environment"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected objects and their tracks in 3D space"
]

instance HistoricalReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generated reports from stored historical data for performance analysis"
]

instance ControlLogicExecutionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Executes ACC control logic based on lead vehicle distance calculations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control of adaptive cruise control system via web interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts desired cruise control speed via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Emergency braking command triggered via control panel UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Physical Twin Entity Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Customized physical twin entity for automotive systems not directly mapped to ISO 23247 OME"
    base:contains SteeringServoActuator, MotorActuationFE, AccControllingFE,
                 HokuyoLiDAR, LiDARDepthCamera, EgoVehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor,
                 PointCloudClusteringFE, KalmanFilterTrackingFE
]

// C12: Digital Twin Entity Components
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Primary Digital Twin Entity hosting core DT services"
    base:contains DataCollectionFE, ReportingFE, PresentationFE,
                 Vehicle3DCADModel, ROS2VisualizationEnabler, SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine collecting real-time data streams from physical twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine generating historical reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance PresentationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feature Engine providing user interface for remote management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// C13: User Entity Components
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interaction entity split into 3D Visualization and Control Panel"
    base:contains ROS2VisualizationComponent, ControlPanelUIComponent
]

instance ROS2VisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based 3D visualization system for real-time rendering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Vehicle3DCADModel
]

instance ControlPanelUIComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based web interface for remote management operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

// C14: Environment
instance AutomotiveTestingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity,
                 NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano, ROS2Middleware, SQLDatabaseEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction occurs through the **ACC Controlling FE** and **Actuation FE**, implementing ISO 15622-based control logic. The DT computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance and transmits commands via ROS2 topics to the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, which forwards motor voltage commands to the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** and steering servo. Emergency braking commands are sent directly to the vehicle’s actuators. Synchronization ensures <100 ms end-to-end latency."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time time-scale** with strict synchronization requirements: **end-to-end latency ≤ 100 ms** (compliant with 3GPP V2V communication standards), and **clock synchronization accuracy ≤ 100 ms** (due to hardware constraints). Data collection and processing rates are aligned with perception cycles (e.g., LiDAR object tracking updates at ~10–20 Hz), ensuring temporal coherence between physical and virtual states."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is organized as a **multi-layered entity-based architecture** inspired by ISO 23247 but adapted for automotive systems. Key components include: **Physical Twin Entity** (hosts sensor/actuator-specific logic), **Digital Twin Entity** (manages data collection, reporting, and visualization), and **User Entity** (splitted into **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel**). The **Data Translation FE** ensures inter-entity communication via standardized ROS2 message types. The DTS is deployed across **onboard hardware (Jetson Orin Nano)** and **cloud-based storage** for remote management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **three lifecycle stages**: **1) Design Phase** (simulator-based prototyping using MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems like point cloud clustering), **2) Manufacturing Phase** (hardware retrofitting of a 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle with autonomy components), and **3) Operational Phase** (real-time monitoring, remote management, and predictive maintenance via DT services). The DT covers the **as-operated** representation phase of the physical twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured through: **1) Sensor Calibration**: LiDAR and depth camera data are pre-processed via DBSCAN/Kalman filter to mitigate noise. **2) Real-Time Synchronization**: Clock synchronization (±100 ms) via NTP or ROS2 time synchronization. **3) Validation Mechanisms**: ISO 15622-based ACC compliance testing, real-time latency validation (<100 ms), and remote management demonstrations. Uncertainty is managed via **Data Translation FE** for unit conversions and **Reporting FE** for historical analysis. Verification includes ROS2 node lifecycle testing and edge computing constraints."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Wi-Fi-based communication** (UDP/ROS2 topics) for inter-entity communication between the vehicle (ROS2 network) and the DT Entity (cloud-based). **Network Protocols**: ROS2 (for intra-vehicle communication) and Wi-Fi (for inter-entity communication). **Latency Requirements**: <100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP V2V compliance). **Security**: No explicit security protocols mentioned; assumes ROS2-based trust models for automotive safety-critical systems."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across **two hardware layers**: **1) Onboard Hardware**: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (hosts Physical Twin Entity, Data Pre-Processing FE, Actuation FE). **2) Cloud-Based Hosting**: External SQL database for data storage and **Data Collection FE** (offloads ACC computation). The **User Entity** (3D Visualization/Control Panel) is accessible via web interfaces or ROS2-based dashboards. Deployment follows ROS2 package-based modularity for maintainability."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT integrates horizontally with **external systems** via ROS2 middleware for inter-vehicle communication (e.g., V2V coordination). It also connects to **3D CAD design tools** (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink) for simulation-based development. No explicit mention of integration with external DTs or enterprise systems (e.g., PLM tools) is provided."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership is **shared**: The **physical twin owner** controls sensor data (LiDAR, cameras), while the **DT service provider** manages processed data (e.g., object tracks, reports) stored in an external SQL database. Privacy considerations are implicit: real-time data streams are secured via ROS2-based trust models, but no explicit encryption (e.g., TLS) or access controls are described."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards: **1) ISO 23247**: Reference architecture (entity-based design, Data Translation FE). **2) ISO 15622**: ACC control logic specification (performance-class I). **3) ROS2**: Middleware for inter-component communication. **4) 3GPP 22.185**: Latency requirements for V2V communication (<100 ms). Custom adaptations include the **Physical Twin Entity** (not defined in ISO 23247) and ROS2-based deployment."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety are addressed via: **1) Safety-Critical Requirements**: <100 ms latency (3GPP compliance), clock synchronization (±100 ms), and ISO 15622-based ACC validation. **2) Trust Models**: ROS2-based communication assumes secure inter-vehicle trust (no explicit encryption). **3) Remote Operations**: Emergency braking commands are sent directly to actuators, ensuring human-in-the-loop safety. **4) Data Integrity**: Data Translation FE ensures unit conversions and message alignment to prevent malformed commands. No mention of cybersecurity frameworks (e.g., ISO 27001) or intrusion detection."
]
